name: StoneX Group Inc.
process: Preparing application for Senior QA Automation Engineer with Agentic Dev role
requirements: Senior QA Automation Engineer with Agentic Dev; Playwright/Cypress; UI/API/performance/security testing; CI/CD with Azure DevOps/GitHub Actions; AI-assisted testing workflows; UAT ownership; secure/risk-based testing; financial services/payments domain; hybrid 4 days office
notes: Fit re-evaluated after full JD review. Strong overlap on automation, Playwright, CI/CD, and AI-assisted quality engineering, but weaker match on financial operations domain, UAT ownership, secure testing depth, and 4-days-office hybrid requirement.
